response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the performer as Kazama Iroha and the song '風向きは entropy' from the video context and on-screen text. 2. Performed a web search for the song, which did not return official lyrics, so I transcribed the audio to get the full Japanese lyrics. 3. Generated an English translation of the transcribed lyrics. 4. Segmented the video into the performance (00:00-03:24) and the post-performance talk (03:24-04:59).
response.global_summary: A vocal performance by VTuber Kazama Iroha of her song '風向きは entropy', followed by a segment where she announces merchandise.

scenes.description: Kazama Iroha performs the song '風向きは entropy' on a stage with a large balloon mascot behind her.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
その精一杯じゃ
うまく笑えない
だけどそれ以上に
世界は優しくて

いつか風が生まれた
足跡が始まる場所
あの日の荷物抱えて
駆け出したとしても
ここに来るんだろう

この景色も
この声も
私を彩るすべて
本音なんてまだわからないけど
ただ風の吹くままに
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
With just that level of effort,
I can't smile well,
But beyond that,
The world is kind.

Someday the wind was born,
The place where footprints begin,
Carrying the baggage of that day,
Even if you ran out,
You'll end up here.

This scenery,
And this voice too,
Everything that colors me.
I don't know my true feelings yet,
Just blowing with the wind.

scenes.description: The song ends, and Kazama Iroha begins a talk segment announcing that photos taken during the performance will be available as merchandise.
